name: Matt's Orange Roughy
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the melted butter, Worcestershire sauce, parsley flakes, minced onion, and seasoned salt in a bowl.
2. Mix well until all ingredients are evenly distributed.
3. Brush the mixture generously on both sides of the orange roughy fillets.
4. Place the fillets in an oven-safe dish.
5. Bake at 350°F for 25 minutes.
